info_anonymous_vote: You have anonymously voted in the poll.
info_anonymous_unvote: You have anonymously unvoted in the poll.
info_anonymous_notice: NOTE: Poll creator still can see who voted which options
info_need_help:
Need help ? | <mailto:{{email}}|E-Mail> | <{{link}}|URL>
Please report any wrong translation, we will fix it for you!
info_welcome_message:
👋 Welcome to Open Poll+!

Open Poll+ is a *free and open-source* app designed to creating polls in Slack. 

🚀 To get started right away, simply type `/{{slack_command}}` in the channel where you want to launch your poll.

🔍 Need more information or assistance? Check out `/{{slack_command}} help` for guidance, or visit our <{{link}}|Github> for more details and tips.

Happy polling with Open Poll+!

P.S. We will notify you here if something goes wrong with your poll, so you won't miss anything!

If you don't want App to DM you, you can turn if off using
`/{{slack_command}} user_config write user_allow_dm false` (For yourself)
`/{{slack_command}} config write app_allow_dm false` (For whole team)

⚠️ If the app displays the Date/Time in an incorrect timezone, you might want to reinstall the app, as some permission scopes might be missing.
mq_field_questions_ph:
Q: Want lunch? [yesno]
Q: Which food? [choice multi]
- Pizza
- Sushi
Q: Comment? [text]
mq_field_questions_hint: One question per `Q:` line. Options on `-` lines. Tag a type in `[...]`: choice · yesno · text · number · date · time · datetime · email · url. Flags: `multi` `add` `required`.
mq_switch_text: Anything you have entered here will be cleared.
mq_err_too_big: Too big for one Slack message (limit ~{{max}} blocks). Use fewer questions or options.
mq_err_choice_2opts: "{{q}}": a choice needs at least 2 options
mq_err_max_questions: only the first {{max}} questions are kept
mq_post_failed: Could not post your multi-question poll (is the bot in that channel?).
mq_recover_dm: Couldn't post your multi-question poll. You can recreate it with this command:
menu_are_you_sure: Are you sure you want to do this?
modal_edit_poll_intro: Update the question or options below. Votes for unchanged options are kept.
menu_support_me: :coffee: Buy me a coffee to help me to maintain servers or just thanks me
modal_create_poll: Create a poll by filling the following form
modal_option_limited_hint: *This option limits the number of choices per user*
modal_option_hidden_hint: *This option hides the votes until revealed*
modal_option_add_choice_hint: This option allows other members to add more choices to this poll.
modal_ch_manual_select: Select a channel to post the poll
modal_ch_response_url_auto: The poll will be posted to the current channel
modal_ch_response_url_hint:
:warning: Please DO NOT change text above :warning:
Poll will be posted to current channel.
modal_ch_warn: :warning: Some of channels may not be visible to the bot. This may result by impossibility to create the poll.
modal_ch_warn_with_response_url:
:warning: Some of channels may not be visible to the bot. This may result by impossibility to create the poll. 
Or just type /{{slack_command}} in the channel that you want to post poll so @{{bot_name}} can create poll for you in any channel
modal_ch_via_cmd_only: :warning: Please type type /{{slack_command}} in the channel that you want to post poll then press enter.
modal_bot_not_in_ch:
:x::x::x:
Bot not in selected channel please close this dialog and `/invite "@{{bot_name}}"` to that channel first 
or just type /{{slack_command}} in channel that you want to create this poll
:x::x::x:
modal_bot_in_ch: :white_check_mark: You can create poll in this channel
task_list:
Found `{{poll_count}}` schedule(s).
To delete schedule, type `/{{slack_command}} schedule delete POLL_ID`
To delete all finished schedules, type `/{{slack_command}} schedule delete_done`
task_delete_refer_warn: If you have a scheduled poll that refers to this poll, the schedule will stop working.
task_scheduled:
Poll ID: `{{poll_id}}`
Scheduled on: `{{ts}}`
Override CH: `{{poll_ch}}`
Max run count: `{{run_max}}`
task_scheduled_with_cron:
Recurring poll: enabled (Cron Expression: `{{cron}}` UTC Time Zone)
:warning: If your scheduled is run more than once within `{{run_max_hrs}}` hours, Your scheduled will get disabled after first run.
task_scheduled_when_note:
- For schedule poll you need to invite the bot to channel with
`/invite "@{{bot_name}}"`
- For simple schedule select `{{task_scheduled_later}}` and wait for the time picker to show.
- For advanced schedule and recurring please use
`/{{slack_command}} schedule create`
err_close_before_post: Auto-close time must be in the future and after the post time.
task_scheduled_post_noti:
Your scheduled poll has been posted.
Poll ID: `{{poll_id}}`
CMD:`{{poll_cmd}}`
Scheduled on: `{{ts}}`{{note}}
task_scheduled_post_noti_error:
There was an error `{{error}}` while trying to post your scheduled poll.
Poll ID: `{{poll_id}}`
CMD:`{{poll_cmd}}`
Scheduled on: `{{ts}}`{{note}}
task_scheduled_disabled_noti:
:octagonal_sign: Your scheduled poll (ID: `{{poll_id}}`) has been disabled and will not run again.
Reason: {{reason}}
err_question_not_quoted:
I couldn't find a quoted question. Surround the question and each choice with double quotes:
`/{{slack_command}} "What's for lunch?" "Pizza" "Sushi"`
Type `/{{slack_command}} help` for more.
err_no_choices:
Your poll needs at least one choice, in double quotes after the question:
`/{{slack_command}} "Question" "Choice 1" "Choice 2"`
Type `/{{slack_command}} help` for more.
err_flag_after_question:
`{{flag}}` must come BEFORE the question. Example:
`/{{slack_command}} {{flag}} "Question" "Choice 1" "Choice 2"`
err_lang_invalid: `{{value}}` is not a supported language code. Valid codes: {{langs}}
err_time_in_past: The time `{{value}}` is already in the past.
err_duplicate_choice: This choice is a duplicate of another choice. Make each choice unique.
err_channel_missing: Please select a channel to post the poll.
err_too_many_blocks: This poll would render {{count}} blocks, more than Slack's 50-block message limit. Reduce the number of choices, or use Compact UI / disable dividers.
err_schedule_create_failed: Failed to create the schedule. Please try again.
err_delete_failed: Could not delete the poll message. The poll and its data were left untouched - please try again.
err_modal_open_failed: Could not open the dialog - the poll content may be too large, or the request expired. Please try again.
err_close_exception: Something went wrong while closing the poll. Please try again.
poll_edit_failed: The poll could not be edited. Please try again or re-open the edit dialog.
close_fail_reason_no_token: Couldn't access this workspace's bot token. The app may need to be reinstalled.
close_fail_reason_render: Couldn't rebuild the poll's display. Please contact your admin if this keeps happening.
close_fail_reason_update: Couldn't update the poll message in Slack - it may have been deleted, or Slack had a temporary issue.
close_fail_reason_unexpected: Something unexpected went wrong while closing the poll. Please contact your admin if this keeps happening.
close_fail_reason_no_interaction: Nobody voted or clicked any button on the poll before its scheduled close time. For polls created via the menu (GUI), the app needs at least one interaction so it can find the message in Slack to close.
close_fail_reason_bad_record: The poll record is missing required information (`{{issues}}`). This is unusual - please contact your admin.
task_scheduled_warn_too_fast: [Schedule][Warn] Poll ID:`{{poll_id}}` First scheduled job and next one is less than {{run_max_hrs}} hours (current {{run_current_hrs}} hours).
task_scheduled_error_too_fast: [Schedule][Error] Poll ID:`{{poll_id}}` Scheduled job run more than once in {{run_max_hrs}} hours (current {{run_current_hrs}} hours). Job is now disabled.
task_scheduled_time_missing: Please select the date and time. If you don't see the DateTime Picker, try to re-select `{{task_scheduled_later}}` again and wait for the picker to show up in a few seconds.
task_usage_help:
Usage:
`/{{slack_command}} schedule create [POLL_ID] [TS] [CH_ID] "[CRON_EXP]" [MAX_RUN]`
`/{{slack_command}} schedule delete [POLL_ID]`
`/{{slack_command}} schedule list`
More detail:`/{{slack_command}} help` or check <{{help_link}}|full document here>.
task_usage_stop_poll:
To stop the schedule:
`/{{slack_command}} schedule delete {{poll_id}}`
poll_edit_not_found: Poll not found. Check the Poll ID from `Command info` on the poll menu.
poll_edit_not_posted: This poll can't be edited yet. If it has no votes, try voting on any option once (you can unvote right after) and retry.
poll_edit_no_question: You must provide a new question and at least one option, e.g. `"What's your favourite color?" "Red" "Green"`.
poll_edit_disabled: Poll editing is disabled for this workspace. Please contact your workspace admin to enable it.
poll_edit_too_old: This poll can only be edited within `{{minutes}}` minutes of being posted.
poll_edit_too_many_options: This poll has `{{count}}` options, more than the `{{max}}` an edit modal can hold. Use `/{{slack_command}} edit POLL_ID "question" "opt1" "opt2" ...` from the command line to edit it.
modal_edit_poll_max_blocks: :warning: Maximum form size reached. Remove an option, or save and re-edit if you need more.
dashboard_link_open: Open this poll's analytics on the dashboard:
dashboard_link_no_permission: Only the poll creator or a workspace admin can open this poll on the dashboard.
dashboard_link_not_configured: The dashboard link is not configured for this workspace.
poll_export_not_found: Poll not found. Check the Poll ID from `Command info` on the poll menu.
poll_export_no_permission: Only the poll creator can export results.
poll_export_truncated: :warning: Output exceeded `{{max}}` chars and was truncated.
task_error_date_invalid: Datetime should be in ISO8601 Format `YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ` , eg. `2023-11-17T21:54:00+07:00`
err_change_vote_poll_closed: You can't change your votes on closed poll.
err_action_other: You can't do this because you are not owner of this poll.
err_close_other: You can't close poll from another user.
err_delete_other: You can't delete poll from another user.
err_reveal_other: You can't reveal poll from another user.
err_see_all_vote_other: You can't see all users votes.
err_see_all_vote_true_anonymous: You can't see all users votes. Because poll is `Anonymous` and `True Anonymous` mode is ENABLE
err_poll_too_old: Your poll is too old. Please create new one.
err_vote_over_limit: You can't vote anymore. Remove a vote to choose another option. (limit =`{{limit}}`)
err_vote_exception: An error occurred during vote processing. Please try again in few seconds.
err_add_choice_exception: An error occurred during add choice processing. Please try again in few seconds.
err_poll_close_exception: An error occurred during close processing. Please try again in few seconds.
err_poll_hide_exception: An error occurred during hide processing. Please try again in few seconds.
err_poll_reveal_exception: An error occurred during reveal processing. Please try again in few seconds.
err_poll_ch_exception:
:warning::warning:
Can not check if you are able to create poll in this channel or not.
You may try to re-select again in few seconds.
err_process_command: Error while processing command please check and try again...
err_invalid_command: Invalid command or parts of command (except question and choice) may contains *bold* ~strike~ _italics_ or `code`
err_only_installer: Only user that install this app can use this command. If the installer is no longer in this workspace, re-install the app (visit the app's install URL) to take ownership - existing team settings are kept.
err_mutex_lock: [Try #{{{count_try}}] Error while attempt to acquire mutex lock.
err_slack_limit_choices_max: Maximum number of choices is `{{slack_limit_choices}}` due to Slack limitation.
err_bot_not_in_ch:
We can't post in selected channel 
please `/invite "@{{bot_name}}"` to that channel first
err_bot_not_in_ch_schedule: For schedule poll you need to `/invite "@{{bot_name}}"` to that channel first
mq_b_mode_switch: Switching keeps your questions — it just re-syncs between the visual list and the text box.
mq_b_no_questions: No questions yet — click ➕ Add question to start.
mq_b_opt_addown: Let people add their own option
mq_b_err_2opts: Add at least 2 options (one per line).
mq_b_err_expired: This draft expired — please run the command again.
